title: Nuget's Computer Mod
body:
# INFORMATION
Hello I made a high quality computer mod
with alot of stuff like keyboards, monitors, computer,
computer mouse, lamps etc. It took alot of time
into this mod.

# CONTENT
- Office Keyboards
- Gaming Keyboards
- Mouses
- Rainbow Lamps
- Foam
- Computer Tower
- Monitors
- Triple Monitor
